title: Trade Responsibility
description: Schema for a trade responsibility assignment within a scope of work. Defines which trade is responsible for specific inclusions, exclusions, and interface coordination.

responsibility_id.description: Unique identifier for this trade responsibility record.

trade.description: Trade responsible for the assigned scope items.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

inclusions.description: Items explicitly included in this trade's responsibility.

exclusions.description: Items explicitly excluded from this trade's responsibility.

interface_zones.description: Interface zone identifiers where this trade coordinates with adjacent trades.

coordination_notes.description: Notes on coordination requirements with other trades.
